approach: 5-step proof: (1) reconstruct_zero_extend since naf[pos]=0, (2) pow2(pos+1)=2*pow2(pos) via lemma_pow2_adds+lemma2_to64, (3) lemma_mod_breakdown to decompose scalar_val%pow2(pos+1), (4) parity argument: extracted=2k+bit via lemma_mod_breakdown, so carry==bit, (5) algebraic combination via distributive+commutative lemmas.
key_insight: Even window means carry equals the least significant bit of the window. This follows from (carry+extracted)%2==0 and extracted = 2k + (scalar/pow2(pos))%2. The reconstruction doesn't change because naf[pos]=0.
notes: Required several compilation fixes: (1) pow2(1)==2 needs lemma2_to64() not direct assertion, (2) parity argument needed explicit mod_breakdown to show extracted=2k+bit, (3) final combination needed explicit mul commutativity lemmas.
